description: Edge egress IP exclusion registry (EC2 EIP + Lightsail Static IP). allocate-clean-egress-eip.py and ops/lightsail/rotate-static-ip.sh refuse fresh allocations that land on these IPs (per region).

polluted.notes: EC2 uk1 orphan EIP released 2026-05-26 after EC2→Lightsail migration (not upstream pollution; exclude from re-allocation)
Lightsail edge-uk1 tokenkey-edge-uk1-ls-ip superseded 2026-05-26; released after matrix correction to 13.134.80.182
Lightsail edge-us2 StaticIp-2 upstream API risk-block (2026-05-29)
